FAILUsers can be listedConnectAs a Posit Team administratorsrc/vip_tests/connect/test_users.py::test_list_users0.30sTest procedureGiven Connect is accessible at the configured URLWhen I list all usersThen the user list is not emptyAnd the test user exists in the user listError tracebackCopyfixturefunc = <function check_test_user_in_list at 0x7fbee7e8c0e0>
request = <FixtureRequest for <Function test_list_users>>
kwargs = {'test_username': 'testuser', 'user_list': [{'active_time': '2026-05-05T16:04:11Z', 'confirmed': True, 'created_time': '2026-05-05T16:02:29Z', 'email': '', ...}]}

    def call_fixture_func(
        fixturefunc: _FixtureFunc[FixtureValue], request: FixtureRequest, kwargs
    ) -> FixtureValue:
        if inspect.isgeneratorfunction(fixturefunc):
            fixturefunc = cast(Callable[..., Generator[FixtureValue]], fixturefunc)
            generator = fixturefunc(**kwargs)
            try:
                fixture_result = next(generator)
            except StopIteration:
                raise ValueError(f"{request.fixturename} did not yield a value") from None
            finalizer = functools.partial(_teardown_yield_fixture, fixturefunc, generator)
            request.addfinalizer(finalizer)
        else:
            fixturefunc = cast(Callable[..., FixtureValue], fixturefunc)
>           fixture_result = fixturefunc(**kwargs)
                             ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^

.venv/lib/python3.13/site-packages/_pytest/fixtures.py:915: 
_ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ 

user_list = [{'active_time': '2026-05-05T16:04:11Z', 'confirmed': True, 'created_time': '2026-05-05T16:02:29Z', 'email': '', ...}]
test_username = 'testuser'

    @then("the test user exists in the user list")
    def check_test_user_in_list(user_list, test_username):
        expected = test_username.split("@", 1)[0]
        usernames = [u.get("username") for u in user_list]
>       assert expected in usernames, (
            f"Test user {expected!r} (from {test_username!r}) not found in user list: {usernames}"
        )

E       assert 'testuser' in ['__bootstrap_admin__']

2026/05/05 16:05:53.777437628 new$pointsize <- pointsize
2026/05/05 16:05:53.777438109 if (!missing(pagecentre))

2026/05/05 16:05:53.777507673 if (!missing(compress))
2026/05/05 16:05:53.777517217 new$compress <- compress
2026/05/05 16:05:53.777517718 old <- check.options(new, name.opt = ".PDF.Options", envir = .PSenv)
2026/05/05 16:05:53.777529355 if (!missing(family) && (inherits(family, "Type1Font") ||
2026/05/05 16:05:53.777529796 inherits(family, "CIDFont"))) {

2026/05/05 16:05:53.777541764 if (inherits(family, "Type1Font") && !is.null(enc) &&
2026/05/05 16:05:53.777552580 enc != "default" && (is.null(old$encoding) || old$encoding ==
2026/05/05 16:05:53.777553021 "default"))
2026/05/05 16:05:53.777570337 old$encoding <- enc
2026/05/05 16:05:53.777571128 family <- family$metrics
2026/05/05 16:05:53.777584528 }
2026/05/05 16:05:53.777584999 if (is.null(old$encoding) || old$encoding == "default")

2026/05/05 16:05:53.777603947 if (length(family) == 4L) {

2026/05/05 16:05:53.777652370 }

2026/05/05 16:05:53.777705389 }

2026/05/05 16:05:53.777192051 function (file = if (onefile) "Rplots.pdf" else "Rplot%03d.pdf",
2026/05/05 16:05:53.777199913 width, height, onefile, family, title, fonts, version, paper,
2026/05/05 16:05:53.777255906 encoding, bg, fg, pointsize, pagecentre, colormodel, useDingbats,
2026/05/05 16:05:53.777257098 useKerning, fillOddEven, compress)
2026/05/05 16:05:53.777273703 {

2026/05/05 16:05:53.777371509 new$version <- version
2026/05/05 16:05:53.777380803 if (!missing(paper))
2026/05/05 16:05:53.777381244 new$paper <- paper
2026/05/05 16:05:53.777395505 if (!missing(encoding))
2026/05/05 16:05:53.777396447 new$encoding <- encoding
2026/05/05 16:05:53.777408349 if (!missing(bg))
2026/05/05 16:05:53.777418049 new$bg <- bg
2026/05/05 16:05:53.777418730 if (!missing(fg))
2026/05/05 16:05:53.777427954 new$fg <- fg
2026/05/05 16:05:53.777428535 if (!missing(pointsize))
2026/05/05 16:05:53.777437628 new$pointsize <- pointsize
2026/05/05 16:05:53.777438109 if (!missing(pagecentre))
2026/05/05 16:05:53.777447603 new$pagecentre <- pagecentre
2026/05/05 16:05:53.777448024 if (!missing(colormodel))
2026/05/05 16:05:53.777465189 new$colormodel <- colormodel
2026/05/05 16:05:53.777465590 if (!missing(useDingbats))
2026/05/05 16:05:53.777479391 new$useDingbats <- useDingbats
2026/05/05 16:05:53.777480272 if (!missing(useKerning))

2026/05/05 16:05:53.777497097 if (!missing(fillOddEven))
2026/05/05 16:05:53.777507242 new$fillOddEven <- fillOddEven
2026/05/05 16:05:53.777507673 if (!missing(compress))
2026/05/05 16:05:53.777517217 new$compress <- compress
2026/05/05 16:05:53.777517718 old <- check.options(new, name.opt = ".PDF.Options", envir = .PSenv)
2026/05/05 16:05:53.777529355 if (!missing(family) && (inherits(family, "Type1Font") ||
2026/05/05 16:05:53.777529796 inherits(family, "CIDFont"))) {
2026/05/05 16:05:53.777541323 enc <- family$encoding
2026/05/05 16:05:53.777541764 if (inherits(family, "Type1Font") && !is.null(enc) &&
2026/05/05 16:05:53.777552580 enc != "default" && (is.null(old$encoding) || old$encoding ==
2026/05/05 16:05:53.777553021 "default"))
2026/05/05 16:05:53.777570337 old$encoding <- enc
2026/05/05 16:05:53.777571128 family <- family$metrics
2026/05/05 16:05:53.777584528 }
2026/05/05 16:05:53.777584999 if (is.null(old$encoding) || old$encoding == "default")
2026/05/05 16:05:53.777594263 old$encoding <- guessEncoding()
2026/05/05 16:05:53.777594713 if (!missing(family)) {
2026/05/05 16:05:53.777603947 if (length(family) == 4L) {

2026/05/05 16:05:53.777614002 }
2026/05/05 16:05:53.777614513 else if (length(family) == 5L) {
2026/05/05 16:05:53.777652370 }
2026/05/05 16:05:53.777653161 else if (length(family) == 1L) {
2026/05/05 16:05:53.777665940 pf <- pdfFonts(family)[[1L]]
2026/05/05 16:05:53.777666360 if (is.null(pf))
2026/05/05 16:05:53.777675714 stop(gettextf("unknown family '%s'", family),
2026/05/05 16:05:53.777676135 domain = NA)
2026/05/05 16:05:53.777686090 matchFont(pf, old$encoding)
2026/05/05 16:05:53.777686601 }
2026/05/05 16:05:53.777695354 else stop("invalid 'family' argument")
2026/05/05 16:05:53.777695794 old$family <- family
2026/05/05 16:05:53.777705389 }
2026/05/05 16:05:53.777705819 version <- old$version

2026/05/05 16:05:53.777743616 else stop("invalid PDF version")
2026/05/05 16:05:53.777744427 onefile <- old$onefile

2026/05/05 16:05:53.777766560 domain = NA)
2026/05/05 16:05:53.777773701 .External(C_PDF, file, old$paper, old$family, old$encoding,
2026/05/05 16:05:53.777784788 old$bg, old$fg, old$width, old$height, old$pointsize,
2026/05/05 16:05:53.777785439 onefile, old$pagecentre, old$title, old$fonts, version[1L],
2026/05/05 16:05:53.777797467 version[2L], old$colormodel, old$useDingbats, old$useKerning,
2026/05/05 16:05:53.777797927 old$fillOddEven, old$compress)
2026/05/05 16:05:53.777812269 invisible()
